result.stdout:
Description:
  SolForge analyzes and modifies Visual Studio solution files to make them more sound

Usage:
  VsSolutions.Tools.SolForge [command] [options]

Options:
  -d, --directory <directory>  The directory to work in
  --version                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

Commands:
  centralmgmt  Modify the solution to support NuGet central package management

commands.payload:
Description:
  SolForge analyzes and modifies Visual Studio solution files to make them more sound

Usage:

Options:

  --version                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

Commands:
  centralmgmt  Modify the solution to support NuGet central package management

result.stdout:
Description:
  Modify the solution to support NuGet central package management

Usage:
  VsSolutions.Tools.SolForge centralmgmt [options]

Options:
  -a, --apply                  Make changes in the file system
  -d, --directory <directory>  The directory to work in
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Modify the solution to support NuGet central package management

Usage:
  VsSolutions.Tools.SolForge centralmgmt [options]

Options:
  -a, --apply                  Make changes in the file system
  -d, --directory <directory>  The directory to work in
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
